series_metadata.series_description: Reports, minutes, correspondence and related materials generated by the Sustainability Program. These documents are included in our general correspondence, conference planning, state and college contacts, and independent projects.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep in office until scanned. Destroy after 5 years, or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: 5 years, or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
